Com o tempo, o Oni deixa de ser apenas um homem em fúria — e se torna a própria fúria encarnada.

subclassFluff.name: Juramento do Despertar Dracônico
entries: “O fogo dos Primevos ainda queima sob a carne do mundo. Que o meu juramento seja a chama que o desperta.”

Os paladinos do Juramento do Despertar Dracônico canalizam o poder e a presença dos Dragões Ancestrais, as primeiras vozes da criação. Eles não veneram deuses, mas honram as forças primordiais que moldaram Kÿr — chamas, ventos e trovões que um dia rugiram com vontade própria. Esses paladinos buscam despertar a centelha dracônica dentro de si, tornando-se pontes entre o poder sagrado e a fúria elemental. Sua justiça é ardente, sua honra é pesada como escamas, e seu juramento ecoa como um rugido entre os planos.

entries.name: Os Preceitos Dracônicos
entries: Os princípios desse juramento refletem o código dos Primevos, equilibrando domínio e sabedoria:

items.name: Honre a Linhagem
items.entry: Seja a continuação digna do poder que o precede.

items.name: Preserve o Equilíbrio
items.entry: Use o fogo com propósito; destrua apenas o que impede a vida.

items.name: Domine o Instinto
items.entry: O dragão interior é força, não tirano.

items.name: Guie pelo Exemplo
items.entry: Que sua presença inspire reverência, não medo.

subclassFluff.name: Domínio do Caos
entries: “A criação não nasceu estável.
Ela nasceu quebrada — e ainda pulsa.”
Os Clérigos da Ordem do Caos veneram o Princípio da Ruptura: a força primordial que antecede leis, ciclos e estruturas.
Eles não servem a um deus único, mas à Vontade Caótica que se manifesta nos Fragmentos do Caos, nas mutações do mundo e nos momentos em que a realidade se recusa a obedecer.
Para esses clérigos, estabilidade é estagnação.
O Caos não é mal — é possibilidade infinita.
{@b # Magias do Domínio do Caos}
Você sempre tem as seguintes magias preparadas. Elas não contam para o número de magias que você pode preparar.
{@b Nível de Clérigo    Magias}
3º    Chromatic Orb, Identify, Mirror Image, Find Traps
{@b 5º    Blur, Blink}
{@b 7º    Compulsion,Confusion}
{@b 9º    Circle of Power, Dominate Person}

subclassFluff.name: Colégio dos Intervalos
entries: O Colégio dos Intervalos ensina que a música não é composta apenas de notas, mas também de pausas, silêncios e da tensão criada entre um som e outro.
Bardos desse colégio estudam a arte de interromper o fluxo natural das coisas, inserindo lacunas na percepção, no tempo e na continuidade dos eventos.

subclassFluff.name: Colégio das Bases Registradas
entries: Bardos do Colégio das Bases Registradas não apenas inspiram criaturas: eles registram padrões estruturais no ambiente. Suas canções, gestos e cadências gravam pequenas leis temporárias no campo de batalha, criando áreas de estabilidade, foco, defesa, memória e contenção.

Essas Bases não substituem magias de concentração completas. Elas são versões menores, móveis e harmônicas de efeitos que o Bardo sustenta com sua Inspiração Bárdica. O resultado é um estilo de suporte tático, coordenação de grupo e controle posicional.

subclassFluff.name: Juramento do Rizoma
entries: Paladinos que juram o Juramento do Rizoma acreditam que nenhuma vida permanece sozinha. Todo ser existe dentro de uma rede de vínculos: sangue, promessa, memória, terra, dor, cura e responsabilidade. Quando essa rede é ferida, o mundo responde. Quando ela é protegida, o mundo floresce.

Para esses paladinos, a força não está apenas na lâmina ou na fé, mas na capacidade de sustentar aqueles que caminham ao seu lado. Eles são guardiões de raízes invisíveis, defensores de comunidades, juramentos e linhagens espirituais. Onde pisam, o solo parece lembrar. Onde lutam, aliados permanecem de pé por mais tempo, e inimigos descobrem que avançar contra uma rede viva é como tentar cortar uma floresta inteira com uma única espada.
Esses paladinos são conhecidos como Guardas-Rizoma, Âncoras Verdes ou Juramentados da Raiz Profunda.

items.name: Nada cresce sozinho
items.entry: Toda vida depende de vínculos. Proteja as relações que sustentam o mundo.

items.name: Toda raiz importa
items.entry: Mesmo o menor elo pode sustentar uma floresta. Não despreze os fracos, os esquecidos ou os feridos.

items.name: O solo guarda tudo
items.entry: Toda ação deixa marcas. Assuma as consequências do que planta.

items.name: Corte a praga, preserve a árvore
items.entry: Combata aquilo que corrompe, explora ou destrói vínculos essenciais.

subclassFluff.name: Arquétipo do Rosto Rizomórfico
entries: Alguns ladinos não se limitam a disfarces. Eles aprendem a capturar e fixar Ecos deixados por criaturas no tecido da realidade. Esses Ecos representam padrões de forma, comportamento, instinto e técnica que podem ser temporariamente incorporados.

Um Rosto Rizomórfico transforma o próprio corpo em um ponto de convergência de possibilidades. Para esses ladinos, identidade não é fixa: é uma estrutura viva, escolhida, rearranjada e usada como ferramenta.

subclassFluff.name: Alma Fragmentária
entries: {@i Alguns feiticeiros não carregam apenas magia no sangue. Eles carregam uma rachadura.}

A Alma Fragmentária nasce quando uma lasca primordial se fixa em uma alma mortal. Essa lasca não é um Fragmento Primordial completo, mas um resíduo vivo de sua lógica: Caos, Destruição, Natureza, Luz, Trevas ou Vento. Ela não concede apenas poder; ela altera a forma como a magia deixa marcas no mundo.
Diferente de um portador pleno de Fragmento Primordial, o Feiticeiro da Alma Fragmentária não domina um conceito. Ele é atravessado por ele.

subclassFluff.name: Patrulheiro das Cicatrizes
entries: {@i Os Patrulheiros das Cicatrizes caminham onde a realidade falhou.}

Eles cruzam Zonas de Eco, campos de Aether partida, ruínas onde o tempo se repete, florestas onde raízes crescem contra a causalidade e regiões marcadas por Fragmentos Primordiais. Para esses rangers, rastrear não é apenas seguir pegadas: é ler resíduos de magia, padrões de distorção, ecos emocionais e feridas deixadas no mundo.
Um Patrulheiro das Cicatrizes não caça apenas criaturas. Ele caça anomalias.

subclassFluff.name: Domínio da Aurora
entries: {@i Clérigos do Domínio da Aurora servem à luz que antecede o sol: a primeira claridade que rompe a noite, revela caminhos ocultos e anuncia que a escuridão não é permanente.}

A Aurora não é apenas fogo, brilho ou destruição radiante. Ela é promessa, renovação, purificação e revelação. Seus clérigos caminham entre os feridos, os amaldiçoados e os perdidos, levando a certeza de que nenhuma noite é absoluta.
Em Kÿr, esses clérigos costumam ser chamados de Portadores da Primeira Luz, Vigias da Manhã ou Sacerdotes do Alvorecer.

subclassFluff.name: Círculo da Primeira Ferida
entries: {@i Druidas do Círculo da Primeira Ferida não protegem a natureza intacta. Eles estudam a natureza depois do corte: a seiva contaminada, o solo que lembra a guerra, a raiz que cresce ao redor de ossos antigos e o veneno que impede uma praga maior.}
Para esses druidas, corrupção não é sempre destruição. Às vezes, é contenção. Às vezes, é o mecanismo pelo qual o mundo impede que algo pior se reproduza.

subclassFluff.name: Guardião de Juramento
entries: {@i Guerreiros que seguem o caminho do Guardião de Juramento não lutam apenas por vitória. Eles lutam por algo que prometeram proteger.}

Em Kÿr, juramentos têm peso. Palavras repetidas diante da Aether, de ancestrais ou de testemunhas certas podem se tornar mais do que intenção: tornam-se vínculo. O Guardião de Juramento transforma esse vínculo em técnica marcial, colocando o próprio corpo entre o perigo e aquilo que não pode cair.
Eles não são paladinos. Sua força não vem de magia divina, mas de disciplina, presença e compromisso absoluto.

subclassFluff.name: Caminho do Pseudomago
entries: {@i Bárbaros do Caminho do Pseudomago vivem em um mundo que chama qualquer coisa inexplicável de magia. Eles discordam.}

Para eles, conjuração é apenas uma forma frágil de explicar feitos que um corpo suficientemente treinado pode realizar. Onde um mago lança uma rajada arcana, o Pseudomago soca o ar com força suficiente para produzir o mesmo resultado. Onde um conjurador dobra o espaço, ele simplesmente salta longe demais para que alguém acompanhe. Onde outros invocam barreiras, ele flexiona o corpo e recusa o impacto.
Pseudomagos não conjuram magias. Eles imitam milagres com força bruta, presença absurda e uma confiança física ofensiva à razão.

entries.name: Pacto do Leviatã
entries: Bruxos que firmam o Pacto do Leviatã não servem a um simples monstro marinho. O Leviatã é uma presença primordial das profundezas: uma vontade colossal associada à pressão, ao silêncio abissal, às marés impossíveis e ao peso esmagador do mundo submerso.

Em Kÿr, alguns acreditam que o Leviatã é um eco vivo de mares anteriores à fixação do mundo. Outros dizem que é uma entidade selada sob oceanos sem fundo, um Fragmento Primordial da Vastidão ou uma consciência nascida do medo mortal diante daquilo que existe abaixo da luz.
Seja qual for a verdade, seus bruxos carregam uma marca clara: sua magia arrasta, afoga, comprime e prende. Eles não queimam o mundo. Eles o puxam para baixo.

subclassFluff.name: Alma Metalizada
entries: Alguns feiticeiros não carregam a magia como chama, sangue ou herança dracônica, mas como liga viva. Em algum momento, seu corpo foi atravessado por metal aethérico: uma bênção de Aetena, uma exposição a uma forja planar, um pacto gravado em aço, uma maldição de ruína antiga ou o contato com uma relíquia que não deveria ter sobrevivido às eras.
A Alma Metalizada transforma o Feiticeiro em um conjurador defensivo, protetivo e resistente. Sua magia não apenas destrói; ela intervém, reveste, ancora, conduz e protege.

monster.name: Lobo de Névoa
languages: Sylvan; understands the languages of its master but cannot speak

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The lobo has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Caçador Etéreo
entries: The lobo can move through objects and creatures as if they were difficult terrain. If it ends its turn inside an object, it takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage.

action.name: Mordida Etérea
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage.

reaction.name: Uivo da Névoa (1/Day)
entries: When the lobo or its master is targeted by an attack, the lobo emits a spectral howl. The attacker must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw against {@dcYourSpellSave} or make the attack with disadvantage.

monster.name: Fênix Menor
languages: Ignan; understands the languages of its master but cannot speak

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The fênix has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Luz Viva
entries: The fênix sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet.

action.name: Investida Fogo
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Fire damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Radiant damage.

reaction.name: Renascimento Ígneo (1/Day)
entries: When the fênix drops to 0 hit points, it explodes in flame. Each creature within 10 feet of it must make a Dexterity saving throw against {@dcYourSpellSave}. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. After the explosion, the fênix returns to life with 1 hit point.

monster.name: Grifo Jovem
languages: Celestial; understands the languages of its master but cannot speak

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The grifo has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Olhos do Céu
entries: The grifo and its master have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks based on sight.

trait.name: Investida Aérea (2/Day)
entries: If the grifo moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Claws attack on the same turn, the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw against {@dcYourSpellSave} or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Garras
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Radiant damage.

monster.name: Tartaruga Etérea
languages: Terran; understands the languages of its master but cannot speak

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The tartaruga has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Ritmo Lento
entries: The tartaruga and its master within 10 feet of it suffer no penalties from swimming, and both ignore difficult terrain caused by shallow water or mud.

action.name: Mordida
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage.

bonus.name: Refúgio de Maré (1/Day)
entries: The tartaruga creates a translucent barrier around itself and its master for 1 round. Both gain a bonus to AC equal to the master's Proficiency Bonus and resistance to Force damage until the start of the tartaruga's next turn.

reaction.name: Carapaça Interposta (2/Day)
entries: When a target within 5 feet of the tartaruga is hit by a melee attack, the tartaruga interposes its shell and grants the target a +2 bonus to AC against the triggering attack, potentially causing it to miss.

monster.name: Serpente Ácida
languages: Primordial; understands the languages of its master but cannot speak

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The serpente has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Manto Corrosivo
entries: When a creature deals melee damage to the serpente, that creature takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Acid damage.

action.name: Mordida Ácida
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Acid damage.

monster.name: Basilisco Jovem
languages: Terran; understands the languages of its master but cannot speak

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The basilisco has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Pele de Pedra
entries: The basilisco has resistance to Slashing and Piercing damage.

action.name: Mordida
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.

reaction.name: Olhar Petrificante {@recharge 5}
entries: When a hostile creature within 10 feet of the basilisco targets it, that creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against {@dcYourSpellSave} or have the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the end of the next turn.

trait.name: Mímica de Ecos
entries: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as whispers, footsteps, animal cries, or short phrases. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful {@dc 12} Wisdom (Insight) check.

trait.name: Memória do Lugar
entries: Once per {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB|Long Rest}, while the raven is in a location where a significant event happened within the last 24 hours, it can repeat one short sound, word, cry, or phrase that the place still echoes. This trait reveals sound only, not thoughts, identities, or hidden truths.

trait.name: Olhos de Batedor
entries: The raven has Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 1 Piercing damage.

reaction.name: Alarme Instintivo
entries: When a hostile creature the raven can see enters a space within 30 feet of its ranger companion, the raven cries out. The ranger can add 1d4 to the next Initiative roll or Wisdom (Perception) check it makes before the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Faro Rizomático
entries: The wolf has Advantage on Wisdom (Perception or Survival) checks made to track a creature that touched natural ground within the last 24 hours.

trait.name: Matilha Disciplinada
entries: The wolf has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage. If the target is Medium or smaller and is touching the ground, it must succeed on a {@dc 12} Strength saving throw or have its Speed reduced by 10 feet until the start of the wolf's next turn.

trait.name: Fúria Ferida
entries: While Bloodied, the boar has Advantage on the first attack roll it makes on each of its turns.

trait.name: Firme nas Patas
entries: The boar has Advantage on saving throws made to avoid or end the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage. If the boar moved at least 20 feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Piercing damage and, if it is Medium or smaller, must succeed on a {@dc 12} Strength saving throw or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Corpo Semissólido
entries: The serpent ignores Difficult Terrain caused by mud, swamp, shallow water, wet soil, or natural sludge.

trait.name: Camuflagem Lodosa
entries: While in mud, swamp, shallow water, or similar terrain, the serpent has Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

action.name: Constrição Lodosa
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition if it is Medium or smaller. Until the grapple ends, the target takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Bludgeoning damage at the start of each of the serpent's turns.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Poison damage.

bonus.name: Afundar
entries: While in mud, swamp, shallow water, or similar terrain, the serpent takes the Hide action.

monster.name: Dracofalcão Primevo
resist: Choose one when domesticated: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison

trait.name: Instinto Dracônico
entries: The drakefalcon's chosen Resistance also determines the damage type of its Elemental Talons.

trait.name: Rasante Controlado
entries: If the drakefalcon flies at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with Elemental Talons on the same turn, the target takes an extra 3 ({@damage 1d6}) damage of the chosen type.

trait.name: Companheiro Aéreo Menor
entries: Before its ranger companion reaches level 10, the drakefalcon can't carry creatures and can't end its turn more than 30 feet above the ground while in combat.

action.name: Elemental Talons
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) damage of the type chosen for Instinto Dracônico.

trait.name: Contorno Quebrado
entries: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the panther subtracts 1d4 from the first attack roll made against it each round.

trait.name: Caçadora Noturna
entries: The panther has Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made in Dim Light or Darkness.

trait.name: Salto Predatório
entries: If the panther moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with Shadow Bite on the same turn, the target must succeed on a {@dc 13} Strength saving throw or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Shadow Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Necrotic damage if the panther had Advantage on the attack roll.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Passo Entre Sombras
entries: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the panther teleports up to 15 feet to an unoccupied space it can see that is also in Dim Light or Darkness.

trait.name: Couraça de Casca
entries: The ceratodont has a +2 bonus to AC against ranged attack rolls.

trait.name: Besta de Carga
entries: The ceratodont counts as one size larger when determining its carrying capacity and the weight it can push, drag, or lift.

trait.name: Estabilidade Natural
entries: The ceratodont has Advantage on saving throws made to avoid being pushed, knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}, or moved against its will.

action.name: Bark Horn
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 10 ({@damage 1d12 + 4}) Piercing damage. If the ceratodont moved at least 20 feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Piercing damage and must succeed on a {@dc 14} Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet away.

reaction.name: Interpor Corpo
entries: When a creature the ceratodont can see hits its ranger companion with an attack while the companion is within 5 feet of the ceratodont, the ceratodont reduces the damage by 7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}).

trait.name: Pulmões de Fornalha
entries: The dragonet can breathe normally in smoke, ash, and volcanic fumes, and it has Advantage on saving throws against being {@condition Blinded|XPHB} by smoke or ash.

trait.name: Cinzas Vivas
entries: When the dragonet deals Fire damage to a creature affected by its ranger companion's {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB}, the target can't take Reactions until the start of the dragonet's next turn.

action.name: Incandescent Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Ash Breath (Recharge 6)
entries: The dragonet exhales burning ash in a 15-foot Cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 12} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Fire damage and has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the start of the dragonet's next turn. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only.

trait.name: Predador Orgulhoso
entries: The manticore has Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell or hearing.

trait.name: Instinto Difícil
entries: If the manticore's ranger companion has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition at the start of the manticore's turn, the manticore must succeed on a {@dc 13} Wisdom saving throw or move toward and attack the nearest hostile creature it can see.

trait.name: Cauda de Espinhos
entries: The manticore has twenty-four tail spikes. It regrows all expended spikes when it finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB|Long Rest}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The manticore makes two attacks, using Bite, Claw, or Tail Spike in any combination.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Tail Spike
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 100/200 ft. {@h} 7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) Piercing damage.

monster.name: Filhote de Wyrm Aetérico
languages: Understands Draconic and Primordial but can't speak

trait.name: Escamas Reativas
entries: Immediately after the wyrm takes Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, or Thunder damage, it gains Resistance to that damage type until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Ressonância de Fragmento
entries: While within 60 feet of an active Primordial Fragment or a major Aetheric disturbance, the wyrm can't benefit from the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition or take the Hide action. During that time, its ranger companion has Advantage on Wisdom (Survival) and Intelligence (Arcana) checks made to sense the general direction of the disturbance.

trait.name: Vínculo Instável
entries: If the wyrm starts its turn more than 120 feet away from its ranger companion, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The wyrm makes two attacks: one with Bite and one with Claw.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 9 ({@damage 1d12 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Force damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Unstable Breath (Recharge 5–6)
entries: The wyrm exhales unstable Aether in a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 14} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 18 ({@damage 4d8}) damage of the type chosen when the wyrm is domesticated: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, or Thunder. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage.

trait.name: Faro de Sangue
entries: The bear has Advantage on Wisdom (Perception or Survival) checks made to find a Bloodied creature.

trait.name: Peso Imparável
entries: The bear has Advantage on saving throws made to avoid being pushed, knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}, or moved against its will.

trait.name: Couro de Ferro Vivo
entries: When the bear is Bloodied, it gains a +2 bonus to AC.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bear makes two attacks: one with Bite and one with Iron Claw.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Iron Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Slashing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Strength saving throw or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Esmagar no Solo
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. This attack can target only a creature that has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

reaction.name: Proteger o Domador
entries: When a creature the bear can see hits its ranger companion with a melee attack while the companion is within 5 feet of the bear, the bear can make one Iron Claw attack against the attacker.

monster.name: Alce-Coroado de Aether
languages: Understands Sylvan and Primordial but can't speak

trait.name: Coroa Ressonante
entries: While the elk is within 30 feet of its ranger companion, both the elk and the ranger have Advantage on saving throws against being {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or {@condition Frightened|XPHB}.

trait.name: Passo Entre Fendas
entries: The elk ignores Difficult Terrain caused by natural terrain, ruins, roots, snow, shallow water, or unstable Aether.

trait.name: Montaria Primeva
entries: A creature riding the elk has Advantage on ability checks and saving throws made to avoid being dismounted.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The elk makes two Antler attacks.

action.name: Antler
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Force damage.

action.name: Investida Astral
entries: The elk moves up to its Speed in a straight line without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}. During this movement, it can move through the space of one Large or smaller creature. That creature must make a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Force damage and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage only.

bonus.name: Chamado da Clareira
entries: The elk chooses one allied creature within 30 feet of itself that can hear it. That creature can immediately move up to 10 feet without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

trait.name: Predador de Carniça
entries: The wyvern has Advantage on Wisdom (Perception or Survival) checks made to find corpses, undead, or Bloodied creatures.

trait.name: Asas de Ossada
entries: The wyvern has Advantage on saving throws against being knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB} while flying.

trait.name: Ferrão Incompleto
entries: The wyvern's venom is unstable. A creature reduced to 0 hit points by the wyvern's Sting is stable if the wyvern's ranger companion chooses to spare it.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The wyvern makes two attacks: one with Bite and one with Sting.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Sting
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or have the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Wing Crash
entries: Each creature of the wyvern's choice within 10 feet of it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Strength saving throw or take 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Bludgeoning damage and have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. The wyvern can then fly up to half its Speed.

trait.name: Casco Incandescente
entries: A creature that hits the bull with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Ímpeto Vulcânico
entries: If the bull moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with Horns on the same turn, the target takes an extra 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Fire damage and must succeed on a {@dc 16} Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 15 feet away.

trait.name: Fúria de Brasa
entries: While Bloodied, the bull's melee attacks deal an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bull makes two attacks: one with Horns and one with Hooves.

action.name: Horns
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Rugido de Fornalha (Recharge 5–6)
entries: The bull releases a blast of heat in a 15-foot Emanation. Each creature of the bull's choice in that area must make a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Fire damage and can't regain hit points until the start of the bull's next turn. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only.

trait.name: Três Cabeças
entries: The hydra has three heads. While it has more than one head, it has Advantage on saving throws against being {@condition Blinded|XPHB}, {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Deafened|XPHB}, {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, {@condition Stunned|XPHB}, or knocked {@condition Unconscious|XPHB}.

trait.name: Vigília Múltipla
entries: The hydra can't be surprised while it has more than one conscious head.

trait.name: Respiração Anfíbia
entries: The hydra can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Cabeça Ferida
entries: Whenever the hydra takes 25 or more damage on a single turn, one of its heads becomes wounded until the end of its next turn. While at least one head is wounded, the hydra makes one fewer Bite attack when it uses Multiattack.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hydra makes three Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Arrastar ao Charco
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Strength saving throw or be pulled up to 10 feet toward the hydra.

reaction.name: Mordida Reflexa
entries: When a creature the hydra can see moves out of its reach, the hydra makes one Bite attack against that creature.

monster.name: Dracólito Prismático Menor
resist: Choose two when domesticated: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, or Thunder
languages: Understands Draconic and Primordial but can't speak

trait.name: Escamas Prismáticas
entries: When the dracolite finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB|Long Rest}, choose two damage types from Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, or Thunder. The dracolite has Resistance to those damage types, and its Prism Bite deals one of those types, chosen each time it hits.

trait.name: Orgulho Dracônico
entries: The dracolite has Advantage on saving throws against being {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or {@condition Frightened|XPHB}.

trait.name: Ressonância Cromática
entries: When the dracolite damages a creature affected by its ranger companion's {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB}, the ranger can choose one creature within 10 feet of the target. That second creature takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) damage of the same elemental type. This trait can trigger only once per turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dracolite makes two attacks: one with Prism Bite and one with Claw.

action.name: Prism Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, or Thunder damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Chromatic Breath (Recharge 5–6)
entries: The dracolite exhales chromatic energy in a 30-foot Cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 27 ({@damage 6d8}) damage of one type chosen from the dracolite's Escamas Prismáticas. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage.

reaction.name: Escama Refratada
entries: When the dracolite takes Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, or Thunder damage, it can reduce the damage by 10 ({@damage 3d6}). If this reduces the damage to 0, the dracolite's next Prism Bite before the end of its next turn deals an extra 3 ({@damage 1d6}) damage of that type.

trait.name: Predador Monumental
entries: The tiger has Advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws against creatures Large or smaller.

trait.name: Salto de Âmbar
entries: If the tiger jumps at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with Claw on the same turn, the target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Strength saving throw or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Rugido de Domínio
entries: Hostile Beasts and Monstrosities with CR 3 or lower have Disadvantage on attack rolls against the tiger unless the tiger is Bloodied.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The tiger makes two attacks: one with Bite and one with Claw.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 19 ({@damage 2d12 + 6}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) Slashing damage. If the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition, it takes an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Rugido Estilhaçante (Recharge 5–6)
entries: Each hostile creature within 30 feet of the tiger that can hear it must make a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Thunder damage and has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only.

reaction.name: Garra de Interdição
entries: When a creature within 10 feet of the tiger hits its ranger companion with a melee attack, the tiger can make one Claw attack against that creature.

trait.name: Olhar Mineralizante
entries: When a creature that can see the basilisk starts its turn within 30 feet of the basilisk, the basilisk can force it to make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw if the basilisk isn't {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}. On a failed save, the creature's Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of its next turn. If the creature fails this saving throw while already affected by this trait, it also has Disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Corpo de Cristal Negro
entries: When the basilisk takes Radiant or Necrotic damage, jagged crystal plates flare across its body. Until the start of its next turn, a creature that hits the basilisk with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Predador de Ruínas
entries: The basilisk has Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks while among stone, ruins, caves, or crystalline terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The basilisk makes two attacks: one with Bite and one with Tail.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 18 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet away.

action.name: Sopro de Pó Vítreo (Recharge 5–6)
entries: The basilisk exhales black crystal dust in a 30-foot Cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Necrotic damage and its Speed becomes 0 until the end of its next turn. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only.

trait.name: Escamas Trovãos
entries: A creature that hits the drake with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Thunder damage if the drake isn't {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}.

trait.name: Voo de Tempestade
entries: The drake has Advantage on saving throws against being knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB} while flying.

trait.name: Ressonância com a Caçada
entries: Once per turn, when the drake hits a creature affected by its ranger companion's {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB}, the target takes an extra 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The drake makes two attacks: one with Bite and one with Claw.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Thunder Breath (Recharge 5–6)
entries: The drake exhales compressed thunder in a 60-foot Line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Thunder damage and is pushed 15 feet away from the drake. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and isn't pushed.

reaction.name: Estouro Defensivo
entries: When a creature within 10 feet of the drake hits its ranger companion with an attack, the drake releases a thunderous crack. The attacker must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw or take 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Thunder damage and have Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Andar nas Paredes
entries: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Teia de Vidro
entries: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, glass threads, crystalline strands, and similar terrain.

trait.name: Predador de Vibração
entries: The spider has Advantage on attack rolls against a creature that is touching a web or crystalline surface connected to the spider.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The spider makes two attacks, using Bite or Glass Leg in any combination.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage. The target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw or have the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Glass Leg
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Web of Glass (Recharge 5–6)
entries: The spider launches razor-thin glass webbing at a point it can see within 60 feet. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point must make a {@dc 16} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Slashing damage and has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only. A {@condition Restrained|XPHB} creature can use its action to make a {@dc 16} Strength check, ending the condition on itself on a success.

bonus.name: Puxão pela Teia
entries: One creature {@condition Restrained|XPHB} by the spider's Web of Glass must succeed on a {@dc 16} Strength saving throw or be pulled up to 15 feet toward the spider.

trait.name: Asas de Nevasca
entries: Ranged attack rolls against the roc have Disadvantage while it is flying in snow, heavy rain, ashfall, or strong wind.

trait.name: Garras de Rapina
entries: When the roc hits a Large or smaller creature with Talons, the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition. Until the grapple ends, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition, and the roc can't use Talons against another target.

trait.name: Predador das Alturas
entries: The roc has Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The roc makes two attacks: one with Beak and one with Talons.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 24 ({@damage 4d8 + 6}) Slashing damage, and the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} if it is Large or smaller.

action.name: Queda Brutal
entries: One creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the roc takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Bludgeoning damage and falls {@condition Prone|XPHB} in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the roc. The grapple then ends.

reaction.name: Batida de Asa
entries: When a creature within 10 feet of the roc hits it with a melee attack, the roc beats its wings. The attacker must succeed on a {@dc 18} Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet away.

monster.name: Serpe-Espelho do Véu
languages: Understands Draconic and one language known by its ranger companion but can't speak

trait.name: Escamas de Reflexo
entries: When a creature the serpe can see targets it with an attack, the serpe can add 1d4 to its AC against that attack. If the attack misses, this trait can't be used again until the start of the serpe's next turn.

trait.name: Memória de Movimento
entries: The serpe has Advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects it can see.

trait.name: Vínculo no Véu
entries: While within 60 feet of its ranger companion, the serpe and the ranger have Advantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks and saving throws against being {@condition Frightened|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The serpe makes two attacks: one with Mirror Bite and one with Tail.

action.name: Mirror Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 15 ft. {@h} 16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a {@dc 17} Strength saving throw or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Breath of Refraction (Recharge 5–6)
entries: The serpe exhales fractured light in a 60-foot Line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Psychic damage and has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only.

reaction.name: Reflexo Protetor
entries: When the serpe's ranger companion is hit by an attack while within 30 feet of the serpe, the serpe can impose Disadvantage on the next attack roll made against that companion before the start of the serpe's next turn.

trait.name: Colosso de Neve
entries: The mammoth has Advantage on saving throws made to avoid being pushed, knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}, or moved against its will.

trait.name: Presença do Rebanho Antigo
entries: While the mammoth is not Bloodied, allied Beasts within 30 feet of it have Advantage on saving throws against being {@condition Frightened|XPHB}.

trait.name: Pisada Sísmica
entries: The ground within 10 feet of the mammoth is Difficult Terrain for hostile creatures.

trait.name: Investida Glacial
entries: If the mammoth moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with Gore on the same turn, the target takes an extra 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Cold damage and must succeed on a {@dc 19} Strength saving throw or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mammoth makes two attacks: one with Gore and one with Stomp.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 25 ({@damage 4d8 + 7}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Stomp
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 29 ({@damage 4d10 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage. This attack can target only a Large or smaller creature.

action.name: Trombeta do Inverno (Recharge 5–6)
entries: The mammoth releases a freezing bellow in a 30-foot Cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Cold damage and its Speed is reduced by 20 feet until the end of its next turn. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and its Speed isn't reduced.

reaction.name: Muralha Viva
entries: When its ranger companion within 10 feet of the mammoth takes damage, the mammoth can reduce that damage by 14 ({@damage 2d10 + 3}).

trait.name: Três Instintos
entries: The chimera has Advantage on saving throws against being {@condition Blinded|XPHB}, {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Deafened|XPHB}, {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, {@condition Stunned|XPHB}, or knocked {@condition Unconscious|XPHB}.

trait.name: Predação Descoordenada
entries: If the chimera starts its turn more than 120 feet away from its ranger companion, it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or move toward and attack the nearest hostile creature it can see.

trait.name: Cicatrizes Vivas
entries: While Bloodied, the chimera's Bite, Horns, and Claws each deal an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) damage.

trait.name: Olhos de Três Feras
entries: The chimera has Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and can't be surprised while conscious.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The chimera makes three attacks: one with Bite, one with Horns, and one with Claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 19 ({@damage 2d12 + 6}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Horns
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a {@dc 18} Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet away.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 16 ({@damage 3d6 + 6}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Sopro da Cicatriz Fogo (Recharge 5–6)
entries: The chimera exhales fire from one of its wounded throats in a 30-foot Cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 17} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 45 ({@damage 10d8}) Fire damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage.

reaction.name: Cabeça Reativa
entries: When a creature misses the chimera with a melee attack, the chimera can make one Bite attack against that creature.

monster.name: Dragão Primevo Menor
resist: Choose two when domesticated: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, or Thunder
languages: Understands Draconic and Primordial but can't speak

trait.name: Escamas Primevas
entries: When the dragon is domesticated, choose two damage types from Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, or Thunder. The dragon has Resistance to those damage types. Whenever it finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB|Long Rest} with its ranger companion, the ranger can change one of those damage types.

trait.name: Presença Dracônica Contida
entries: Hostile creatures of the dragon's choice that start their turn within 20 feet of it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or have Disadvantage on the next attack roll they make against a creature other than the dragon before the start of their next turn. A creature that succeeds on this saving throw is immune to this trait for 24 hours.

trait.name: Marca da Caçada Primeva
entries: Once per turn, when the dragon hits a creature affected by its ranger companion's {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB}, the target takes an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) damage of one type chosen from the dragon's Escamas Primevas.

trait.name: Vínculo de Escamas
entries: If the dragon starts its turn more than 120 feet away from its ranger companion, it can't use Primeval Breath until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes three attacks: one with Bite and two with Claw.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h} 19 ({@damage 2d12 + 6}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) damage of one type chosen from the dragon's Escamas Primevas.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h} 13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 15 ft. {@h} 17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a {@dc 18} Strength saving throw or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Primeval Breath (Recharge 5–6)
entries: The dragon exhales primordial energy in a 60-foot Cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 17} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 49 ({@damage 11d8}) damage of one type chosen from the dragon's Escamas Primevas. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage.

reaction.name: Asa Protetora
entries: When its ranger companion within 15 feet of the dragon is hit by an attack, the dragon can impose a -1d8 penalty on the attack roll, potentially causing it to miss.

monster.name: Reflexo Menor
languages: understands the languages of its reflected creature but can't speak normally

trait.name: Reflexo Instável
entries: When the Reflexo Menor is reduced to 0 hit points, it shatters into light. The creature that destroyed it must succeed on a {@dc 13} Wisdom saving throw or the temple learns one superficial guilt from that creature.

trait.name: Presença Espelhada
entries: The Reflexo Menor can occupy the space of an allied creature, provided it ends its turn in an unoccupied space.

action.name: Corte Refletido
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Psychic damage.
Função: Lacaio ilusório de classificação.
Tática: Usado para bloquear corredores, atrapalhar conjuradores e forçar testes de Sabedoria logo no início do templo.

trait.name: Passo nas Paredes
entries: The thri-kreen ignores Difficult Terrain created by walls, pillars, rubble, and irregular stone surfaces while climbing.

trait.name: Marca de Pacto
entries: Once per turn, when the thri-kreen hits a creature that has failed a Wisdom saving throw since the start of this combat, the attack deals an extra 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic damage.

trait.name: Múltiplos Braços
entries: The thri-kreen can interact with one additional object on its turn, provided the object is on its body or within reach.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The thri-kreen makes two attacks, using Lâmina de Quitina or Dardo de Cinza in any combination.

action.name: Lâmina de Quitina
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Dardo de Cinza
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 6}, range 60 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Fire damage.

bonus.name: Reposicionar nas Paredes
entries: The thri-kreen moves up to 10 feet without provoking Opportunity Attacks if it is adjacent to a wall, pillar, or vertical structure.
Função: Agressor móvel dos pactuados thri-kreen.
Tática: Ataca pelas laterais, tenta isolar personagens feridos e usa altura ou paredes para quebrar linhas de visão.

trait.name: Leitura de Fraqueza
entries: The Escriba has Advantage on Intelligence checks made to identify magic, contracts, inscriptions, or ritual effects inside the temple.

trait.name: Cláusula de Retirada
entries: When the Escriba has 10 hit points or fewer, it can take the Disengage action as a Bonus Action. If it escapes, it reappears in a later encounter as a witness.

action.name: Caneta de Corrente
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 60 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Registrar Fraqueza
entries: The Escriba chooses one creature it can see within 60 feet. Until the start of the Escriba's next turn, the first attack roll against that creature has Advantage.

reaction.name: Anotar Ferida
entries: When an allied creature within 60 feet hits with an attack, the Escriba adds 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic damage to the attack's damage.
Função: Suporte, observador e burocrata infernal menor.
Tática: Fica no fundo do encontro. Ele não quer morrer: quer medir padrões, registrar reações e fugir com informações.

monster.name: Sentinela Prismática
languages: understands Infernal and Primordial but doesn't speak

trait.name: Refratar Magia
entries: Once per round, when the Sentinela takes damage from a spell, it reduces that damage by {@dice 1d10}.

trait.name: Guardião de Ressonância
entries: While within 10 feet of a Cristal de Ressonância, the Sentinela has Advantage on saving throws against effects that would move it or knock it Prone.

trait.name: Cor Variável
entries: The extra damage of its Lâmina Prismática changes with each attack. Roll {@dice 1d6}: 1, Fire; 2, Cold; 3, Lightning; 4, Acid; 5, Psychic; 6, Radiant.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Sentinela makes two Lâmina Prismática attacks.

action.name: Lâmina Prismática
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) damage of a variable type.

action.name: Pulso de Vidro {@recharge 5}
entries: Each creature of the Sentinela's choice within 10 feet must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Force damage and is pushed 10 feet. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and isn't pushed.
Função: Defensora prismática da Câmara dos Fragmentos.
Tática: Protege cristais, ocupa gargalos e usa alcance para impedir que os personagens estabilizem a sala com facilidade.

monster.name: Fragmento Falso
resist: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
languages: telepathy 60 ft.; speaks in incomplete phrases

trait.name: Identidade Rachada
entries: When the Fragmento Falso hits a creature, the target must make a {@dc 14} Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the target can't benefit from Advantage until the start of the Fragmento's next turn.

trait.name: Forma Inacabada
entries: The Fragmento can move through hostile creatures' spaces as Difficult Terrain, but it can't end its turn in another creature's space.

trait.name: Desfazer Forma
entries: When reduced to 0 hit points, the Fragmento explodes into shards of color. Each creature within 10 feet must make a {@dc 14} Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

action.name: Toque Inacabado
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage.

bonus.name: Cintilar
entries: The Fragmento teleports up to 15 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, provided the destination is in dim light, near a reflection, or near crystal.
Função: Criatura instável gerada por ressonância conceitual falsa.
Tática: Irrita conjuradores, quebra vantagem e explode quando destruído. Deve ser frágil, mas incômodo.

trait.name: Autoridade Bibliográfica
entries: While at least one allied Escriba de Corrente is alive and within 60 feet of the Arquivista, the Arquivista gains a +2 bonus to AC.

trait.name: Registro Parcial
entries: Once per turn, when a creature fails an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma saving throw against the Arquivista, that creature receives a Marca de Arquivo.

trait.name: Arquivo Vivo
entries: The Arquivista has Advantage on saving throws against effects that would give it the Incapacitated condition or prevent it from speaking.

action.name: Página Cortante
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8}, range 90 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Comando de Rodapé
entries: One creature that can hear the Arquivista within 60 feet must make a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target uses its Reaction, if available, to move up to 15 feet toward a bookshelf, pulpit, or point indicated by the Arquivista.

action.name: Reescrever Conclusão {@recharge 5}
entries: One creature with a Marca de Arquivo within 60 feet must make a {@dc 15} Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the target has the Incapacitated condition until the end of its next turn, trapped in a contradictory version of itself.

reaction.name: Correção Marginal
entries: When the Arquivista fails a saving throw, it can remove a Marca de Arquivo from one creature within 60 feet to reroll the save.
Função: Controlador da Biblioteca das Mentiras.
Tática: Tenta marcar Lars ou Miana. Não luta por brutalidade; manipula posição, registro e conclusão.

trait.name: Vínculo de Autoridade
entries: While within 60 feet of an Arquivista Infernal, the Escriba can't be Frightened.

trait.name: Anotar Ferida
entries: When an ally within 60 feet hits with an attack, the Escriba can use its Reaction to add 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic damage to the attack's damage.

action.name: Corrente de Tinta
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 30 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Puxão de Cláusula
entries: One creature within 30 feet must make a {@dc 13} Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the target is pulled 10 feet toward the Escriba or toward a pulpit.
Função: Suporte burocrático e amplificador do Arquivista.
Tática: Fica em meia cobertura, adiciona dano e arrasta personagens para posições ruins na biblioteca.

trait.name: Caligrafia Sufocante
entries: If three or more Livros-Mordaça are adjacent to the same target, that target can't use verbal components until it moves away from at least one of them or destroys at least one of them.

trait.name: Objeto Animado
entries: The Livro-Mordaça appears to be an ordinary book while it remains motionless on a shelf or table.

action.name: Mordida de Página
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage.
Função: Lacaio anti-conjuração da Biblioteca das Mentiras.
Tática: Enxames pequenos contra conjuradores. Devem incomodar, não consumir turnos demais.

monster.name: Reflexo Confessional
languages: speaks in the voices of the characters

trait.name: Eu Sobrevivi Porque Fui Embora
entries: The Reflexo has Advantage on attack rolls against creatures that are more than 30 feet away from all conscious allies.

trait.name: Verdade Contradita
entries: When a creature within 30 feet confesses a relevant truth about fear, guilt, abandonment, or attachment, the Reflexo loses 20 hit points. If that truth directly contradicts the Reflexo's existence, the Reflexo disappears.

trait.name: Espelho de Saída
entries: The Reflexo can pass through doors and nonmagical reflective surfaces as if they were Difficult Terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Reflexo makes two Golpe de Versão attacks.

action.name: Golpe de Versão
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Fala que Fere
entries: One creature within 30 feet must make a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage and can't benefit from the Help action until the start of its next turn.

bonus.name: Escolha Melhor {@recharge 5}
entries: The Reflexo teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space near a door, exit, or mirror. Until the start of its next turn, attack rolls against it have Disadvantage.
Função: Inimigo emocional das Câmaras da Confissão.
Tática: Divide emocionalmente. O combate deve incentivar falas reais dos personagens para derrotá-lo de forma mais limpa.

trait.name: Quebrar o Estagnado
entries: The Eco deals an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) damage against creatures that haven't moved since the end of their last turn.

trait.name: Corpo de Ruptura
entries: When the Eco takes Lightning or Thunder damage, it can choose not to apply its resistance to that damage. If it does so, its next attack before the end of its next turn deals an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Thunder damage.

trait.name: Memória de Guerra
entries: The Eco isn't the true bearer of Tempestade or Destruição, but a historical reverberation. Effects that reveal extraplanar creatures perceive it as an echo, not a complete entity.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Eco makes two Machado de Trovão attacks.

action.name: Machado de Trovão
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Thunder damage.

action.name: Ruptura Necessária {@recharge 5}
entries: The Eco releases force in a 15-foot Cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Thunder damage and has the Prone condition. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and isn't Prone.
Função: Elite ofensiva do Salão dos Ecos.
Tática: Pressiona quem fica parado e quebra formações rígidas. É a expressão de que destruição pode ser vista como cura brutal.

trait.name: Promessa Atraente
entries: Creatures Charmed by the Eco do Desejo don't perceive the Eco as hostile unless it directly deals damage to them.

trait.name: Controle Sedutor
entries: The Eco has Advantage on Charisma checks against creatures that have accepted an offer, promise, or pact in this temple.

trait.name: Memória de Guerra
entries: The Eco represents desire as a force that preserves bonds by imposing will.

action.name: Toque da Promessa
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Vem Comigo
entries: One creature within 60 feet must make a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, it uses its movement, if possible, to approach the Eco. This movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks, as it isn't voluntary flight.

action.name: Oferta Perfeita {@recharge 5}
entries: One creature within 60 feet hears a personal promise and must make a {@dc 15} Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the target has the Charmed condition until the end of its next turn. While Charmed this way, the target can't attack the Eco do Desejo.

bonus.name: Olhar de Aproximação
entries: The Eco chooses one creature within 30 feet. The next attack roll against that creature before the start of the Eco's next turn gains a +1d4 bonus.
Função: Controlador sedutor do Salão dos Ecos.
Tática: Puxa alvos para fora da formação e tenta converter medo em adesão. Deve falar enquanto luta.

trait.name: Finalizar Ciclo
entries: When the Eco hits a Bloodied creature, the attack deals an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Necrotic damage.

trait.name: Ausência de Crueldade
entries: The Eco da Morte doesn't pursue unconscious creatures unless the temple forces it to do so. It ends cycles; it doesn't savor suffering.

trait.name: Memória de Guerra
entries: The Eco represents Death as a necessary conclusion against corrupted or overextended permanence.

action.name: Foice do Encerramento
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Silêncio do Fim {@recharge 5}
entries: One creature within 30 feet must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target can't regain hit points until the end of its next turn.

reaction.name: Interromper Persistência
entries: When a creature within 30 feet regains hit points, the Eco reduces the healing by 7 ({@damage 2d6}).
Função: Executor conceitual do Salão dos Ecos.
Tática: Ataca alvos Bloodied e nega cura por janelas curtas. Deve parecer inevitável, não raivoso.

trait.name: Zona de Memória Instável
entries: When the Eco Menor dies, it leaves a 10-foot zone until the end of the next round. The first creature that enters the zone or starts its turn there must succeed on a {@dc 13} Intelligence saving throw or lose 10 feet of movement on that turn as it sees a fragment of an ancient battle.

trait.name: Soldado Sem Exército
entries: The Eco has Advantage on the first attack roll it makes against a creature that is already adjacent to another Eco.

action.name: Ataque Variável
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) damage. O Mestre escolhe o tipo de dano entre cortante, fogo, relâmpago, necrótico ou psíquico, de acordo com a memória projetada.
Função: Lacaio memorial do Salão dos Ecos.
Tática: Serve para ocupar espaço, ativar zonas de memória e dar corpo ao campo de batalha histórico.

trait.name: Oficial do Protocolo
entries: Verris doesn't initiate combat if the group accepts dialogue. If attacked, the entire Santuário Central treats the group as approaching by force.

trait.name: Classificar Variável
entries: When a creature fails a saving throw against Verris, until the end of that creature's next turn, it can't benefit from Advantage.

trait.name: Presença Administrativa
entries: Allied creatures within 30 feet of Verris have Advantage on saving throws against being Charmed or Frightened.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Verris makes two Lâmina de Vidro attacks, or makes one Lâmina de Vidro attack and uses Ordem de Protocolo.

action.name: Lâmina de Vidro
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Ordem de Protocolo
entries: One creature within 60 feet that can hear Verris must make a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, Verris chooses one effect: the target drops one item it is holding; the target moves 15 feet to an indicated area; or the target loses its Reaction until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Classificar Variável {@recharge 5}
entries: One creature within 60 feet must make a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the target can't benefit from Advantage until the end of its next turn.

reaction.name: Correção de Reflexo
entries: When Verris is hit by an attack, he reduces the damage by {@dice 1d10 + 5} and teleports 10 feet to an unoccupied space he can see.
Função: Pré-chefe social/combativo e mestre de cerimônias do Avatar.
Tática: Só deve lutar se os personagens escolherem força. Usa teleporte curto, negação de vantagem e ordens para controlar o campo.

trait.name: Proteger Protocolo
entries: If Verris is within 10 feet, the Guardião can impose Disadvantage on one attack roll against him as a Reaction.

trait.name: Ancoragem Prismática
entries: The Guardião has Advantage on saving throws against effects that would push it, knock it Prone, or teleport it against its will.

trait.name: Corpo de Cores Pesadas
entries: When the Guardião takes damage of a type to which it has resistance, its next attack before the end of its next turn deals an extra 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Radiant damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Guardião makes two Punho Prismático attacks.

action.name: Punho Prismático
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d12 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Radiant damage.

action.name: Impacto de Protocolo {@recharge 5}
entries: Each creature in a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide must make a {@dc 15} Strength saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Bludgeoning damage and is pushed 10 feet. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and isn't pushed.
Função: Defensor pesado do Santuário Central.
Tática: Fica próximo de Verris e dos pontos centrais. Serve para punir avanço direto e proteger o protocolo.

monster.name: Avatar do Arqui-Diabo das Cores Fragmentadas
resist: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
languages: all languages it heard in the temple

trait.name: Forma que Não Aparece Inteira
entries: The Avatar doesn't occupy space in the same way for everyone. Attack rolls against it can't have Advantage while fewer than three conscious characters are within 30 feet of one another.

trait.name: Fraqueza de Convergência
entries: While Miana and Tal'Akhar are conscious and within 60 feet of each other, the Avatar loses resistance to Psychic and Force damage.

trait.name: Observador do Espelho Negro
entries: The Avatar has Advantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks against Miana and creatures that have directly interacted with reflections, ritual mirrors, or pacts inside the temple.

trait.name: Resistência Mágica
entries: The Avatar has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Resistência Lendária (3/Day)
entries: If the Avatar fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Avatar makes three attacks: two Garra Prismática attacks and one Voz do Vidro attack.

action.name: Garra Prismática
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) Slashing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Voz do Vidro
entries: One creature within 60 feet that can hear the Avatar must make a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Psychic damage and can't use Reactions until the start of its next turn. On a successful save, the target takes half as much damage only.

action.name: Reflexo Quebrado {@recharge 5}
entries: The Avatar projects fractured reflections in a 30-foot Cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 17} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 27 ({@damage 6d8}) damage, divided by the Avatar between Slashing and Psychic. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage.

bonus.name: Oferta Menor
entries: One creature within 60 feet must make a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the target has Disadvantage on the next saving throw it makes against the Avatar before the end of the Avatar's next turn.

reaction.name: Desalinhamento Espelhado
entries: When a creature hits the Avatar with an attack, the Avatar can force the attacker to make a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the attacker is teleported 10 feet to an unoccupied space the Avatar can see.

legendary.name: Mover Reflexo
entries: The Avatar moves up to half its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

legendary.name: Corte de Cor
entries: The Avatar makes one Garra Prismática attack.

legendary.name: Oferta Menor
entries: The Avatar uses Oferta Menor.

legendary.name: Reposicionar Peça (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The Avatar chooses one creature within 60 feet. The creature must make a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, it is teleported up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space the Avatar can see.
Função: Boss narrativo do templo.
Tática: Fase 1 mede e provoca. Fase 2 tenta separar. Fase 3 oferece saídas pessoais. O objetivo não é apenas matar: é classificar o grupo como separável ou inseparável.

condition.name: Queimando
entries: Enquanto você estiver com a condição Queimando, você experimenta os seguintes efeitos.

items.name: Dano Contínuo de Fogo
items.entry: No início de cada um dos seus turnos, você sofre {@damage 1d6} de dano de fogo.

items.name: Interação Inflamável
items.entry: Se você terminar seu turno em contato com criaturas ou objetos inflamáveis, o Mestre pode aplicar a condição Queimando a eles.

items.name: Extinguir Chamas
items.entry: A condição termina se você ou outra criatura gastar uma {@action Action|XPHB|Ação} para apagar o fogo, se você sofrer dano de frio ou se for submerso em água ou efeito similar.

condition.name: Resfriado
entries: Enquanto você estiver com a condição Resfriado, você experimenta os seguintes efeitos.

items.name: Deslocamento Reduzido
items.entry: Seu deslocamento é reduzido em 10 pés.

items.name: Reflexos Lentificados
items.entry: Você tem {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB|Desvantagem} em testes de habilidade de Destreza.

items.name: Escalada de Frio
items.entry: Se você receber a condição Resfriado enquanto já estiver Resfriado, você fica {@condition Congelado|MundoDeKyrCompendioPrimordialDeZarthion}.

items.name: Fim do Resfriamento
items.entry: A condição termina ao final de um {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Descanso Curto} ou se você sofrer dano de fogo.

condition.name: Congelado
entries: Enquanto você estiver com a condição Congelado, você experimenta os seguintes efeitos.

items.name: Deslocamento Anulado
items.entry: Seu deslocamento se torna 0.

items.name: Rigidez Gélida
items.entry: Você tem {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB|Desvantagem} em jogadas de ataque e em testes de resistência de Destreza.

items.name: Quebrar o Gelo
items.entry: Quando você sofrer dano contundente, cortante ou de fogo, a condição termina ao final do turno atual.

condition.name: Corroído
entries: Enquanto você estiver com a condição Corroído, você experimenta os seguintes efeitos.

items.name: Dano Ácido Contínuo
items.entry: No início de cada um dos seus turnos, você sofre {@damage 1d4} de dano ácido.

items.name: Defesas Comprometidas
items.entry: Sua Classe de Armadura é reduzida em 2 enquanto a condição durar.

items.name: Remover Corrosão
items.entry: A condição termina se você for lavado com água suficiente, sofrer dano de frio ou receber um efeito de restauração mágica.

condition.name: Eletrificado
entries: Enquanto você estiver com a condição Eletrificado, você experimenta os seguintes efeitos.

items.name: Carga Instável
items.entry: A primeira vez em cada rodada que você atingir uma criatura com um ataque corpo a corpo ou for atingido por um ataque corpo a corpo, a outra criatura sofre {@damage 1d4} de dano de relâmpago.

items.name: Controle Muscular Prejudicado
items.entry: Você tem {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB|Desvantagem} em testes de habilidade de Força e Destreza.

items.name: Dissipar Carga
items.entry: A condição termina ao final do seu próximo turno se você não sofrer dano de relâmpago adicional antes disso.

condition.name: Ressoante
entries: Uma criatura Ressoante está marcada por uma vibração mágica instável. A condição não possui efeito universal próprio; cada magia ou característica que a aplica define como a ressonância se manifesta e quando termina.

itemMastery.name: Bleed
entries: Quando você acerta uma criatura com uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo usando esta arma, o alvo deve realizar um teste de resistência de Constituição (CD 8 + seu bônus de proficiência + o modificador de habilidade usado para o ataque). Em uma falha, a criatura começa a sangrar e sofre {@damage 1d4} de dano no início de cada um dos turnos dela. Esse dano é do mesmo tipo causado pela arma. O sangramento cessa se a criatura receber qualquer cura ou se alguém gastar uma ação para fazer um teste bem-sucedido de Sabedoria ({@skill Medicine}) CD 10 para estancar o ferimento. O sangramento não acumula. Mortos-vivos, Constructos e Elementais são imunes a esse sangramento.

itemMastery.name: Hook
entries: Uma vez por turno, quando você acerta uma criatura com esta arma, pode puxá-la até 5 pés em sua direção, desde que o alvo não seja mais do que um tamanho maior que o seu. Se o alvo estiver montado, ele deve realizar um teste de resistência de Destreza (CD 8 + seu bônus de proficiência + o modificador de habilidade usado para o ataque) ou será desmontado e cairá {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

itemMastery.name: Disarming
entries: Uma vez por turno, ao acertar um ataque com esta arma contra uma criatura que esteja segurando um objeto, o alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Destreza (CD 8 + seu bônus de proficiência + o modificador de habilidade usado para o ataque). Em uma falha, ele solta o objeto. Em um sucesso, ele realiza o próximo ataque com {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB|Desvantagem}.

itemMastery.name: Drive
entries: Ao acertar um ataque com esta arma no alcance máximo dela, você pode se mover até 10 pés sem provocar Ataques de Oportunidade. Esta habilidade só pode ser ativada uma vez por turno.

itemMastery.name: Guard
entries: Após acertar um ataque com esta arma no round, você ganha +1 de CA até o início do seu próximo turno.

itemMastery.name: Riposte
entries: Quando uma criatura erra um ataque corpo a corpo contra você, você pode usar sua Reação para fazer um ataque com esta arma contra ela.

itemMastery.name: Rend
entries: Se você acertar a mesma criatura duas vezes no mesmo turno com esta arma, adicione um dado adicional de dano conforme seu bônus de proficiência: {@dice 1d6} se seu bônus de proficiência for +2, {@dice 1d8} se for +3, {@dice 1d10} se for +4, {@dice 1d12} se for +5, e {@dice 2d6} se for +6.

itemMastery.name: Parry
entries: Ao ser acertado por um ataque, você pode usar sua Reação para adicionar seu bônus de proficiência à sua CA contra esse ataque, potencialmente fazendo-o errar.

background.name: Casa Vahl
entries: Você cresceu entre selos, linhagens, contratos e versões oficiais da verdade. Na Casa Vahl, aprender a ler um documento também significa aprender quem pode existir politicamente, quem pode herdar e qual memória deve permanecer em circulação.

entries: Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma

background.name: Casa Morgrin
entries: Você foi criado em uma casa de postos, disciplina, honra militar e obediência difícil. Um Morgrin aprende cedo que uma linha só se mantém se alguém permanecer quando todos os outros hesitam.

background.name: Casa Seraphine
entries: Você cresceu entre ritos, cerimônias, funerais, mediações e palavras medidas. A Casa Seraphine ensina que uma sala pode ser contida antes da violência, mas também que a paz pode virar cumplicidade quando a verdade é adiada demais.

background.name: Casa Keln
entries: Você foi formado em estufas, salas de aula, herbários, cadernos de campo e laboratórios vivos. A Casa Keln trata conhecimento como cuidado, mas também como risco: uma cura, uma semente ou uma aula podem mudar o rumo de uma guerra.

background.name: Casa Drenvar
entries: Você aprendeu a manter a voz baixa e a mão firme diante da dor alheia. Em público, os Drenvar são curadores refinados; por dentro, sabem que a mesma precisão que salva uma vida também pode encerrar uma ameaça sem ruído.

background.name: Casa Orsik
entries: Você cresceu entre forjas, couro, escamas, osso, martelo e responsabilidade material. Um Orsik mede discursos pela resistência da peça que sustentará o reino quando a guerra deixar de ser ideia e virar peso.

background.name: Casa Halren
entries: Você foi educado em salões onde um convite, um atraso ou uma cadeira vazia podiam mudar alianças. A Casa Halren ensina que reputação não é vaidade; é infraestrutura política.

background.name: Guarda Luminar
entries: Você serviu ou foi treinado pela força que transforma a ordem de Tarth em presença de rua. Na Guarda Luminar, disciplina, patrulha e custódia são técnicas de controle, mas cada guarda precisa decidir até onde a ordem ainda merece obediência.

background.name: Colégio da Luz Vigilante
entries: Você foi formado em um órgão que monitora o Aether e trata magia como risco público. O Colégio não odeia magia; ele teme o que a magia pode se tornar quando ninguém está olhando.

background.name: Véu de Nyxar
entries: Você foi treinado para existir apenas enquanto a missão exige. O Véu de Nyxar resolve aquilo que o Estado não pode registrar, e cada nome usado por seus agentes cobra um pedaço da identidade que veio antes.

background.name: Consórcio do Pulso Verde
entries: Você aprendeu que o reino vive porque o fluxo circula: comida, madeira, remédios, contratos, crédito e rotas. O Consórcio chama isso de logística; seus críticos chamam de poder em forma de escassez.

background.name: Caçadores da Orla
entries: Você trabalha onde o mapa acaba. Os Caçadores da Orla escoltam, rastreiam, exploram e sobrevivem em regiões que a Guarda não controla, onde a floresta de Bornewulf ainda negocia suas próprias regras.

background.name: Arquivistas da Raiz
entries: Você pertence a uma rede clandestina que preserva registros proibidos, nomes apagados e memórias que Lumenkar tentou emparedar. Para os Arquivistas, testemunhar é um ato político.

entries.name: Ability Scores Recomendados
entries: Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma

background.name: Herdeiros do Verde
entries: Você foi tocado pela resistência que acredita que Bornewulf foi arrancado de seu curso natural. Os Herdeiros do Verde carregam mensagens, abrigos, rotas e contradições de uma causa que ainda decide se quer restaurar o passado ou criar algo novo.

entries: Dexterity, Wisdom, Charisma

background.name: Magis da Corte
entries: Você foi educado perto demais da Cidadela para tratar magia como liberdade pura. Os Magis da Corte interpretam o Aether para o poder, protegem cerimônias e transformam símbolos arcanos em pareceres que podem salvar ou condenar casas inteiras.

background.name: Templo da Aurora
entries: Você serviu sob luz, rito, velas, confissão e memória dos mortos. No Templo da Aurora, a fé pública tenta sobreviver entre a luz que consola e a luz que Tarth transforma em vigilância.

itemProperty.name: Discreta
entries: A armadura é feita para passar despercebida sob roupas comuns, mantos, uniformes ou trajes formais. Enquanto estiver usando uma armadura com esta propriedade e tiver Armor Training com a categoria dela, você tem Advantage em Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks ou Charisma (Deception) checks feitos para esconder que está usando armadura.

itemProperty.name: Flexível
entries: A armadura acompanha os movimentos do corpo. Esta propriedade só pode ser aplicada a Medium Armor. Enquanto estiver usando uma armadura média com esta propriedade e tiver Armor Training com Medium Armor, o limite máximo de modificador de Destreza que você pode somar à AC dessa armadura aumenta em 1.

itemProperty.name: Reforçada
entries: A armadura possui placas sobrepostas, acolchoamento interno, rebites de impacto ou camadas de amortecimento feitas para dissipar golpes físicos.

Enquanto estiver usando uma armadura com esta propriedade e tiver Armor Training com a categoria dela, sempre que você sofrer Bludgeoning, Piercing ou Slashing damage de um ataque, reduza o dano em uma quantidade determinada pela categoria da armadura: 2 se a armadura for Medium ou 3 se a armadura for Heavy.
Essa redução é aplicada antes de resistência ou vulnerabilidade e não pode reduzir o dano abaixo de 0.

itemProperty.name: Prestígio
entries: A armadura é reconhecida como símbolo de nobreza, patente, riqueza, ofício militar ou autoridade institucional. Enquanto estiver usando uma armadura com esta propriedade e tiver Armor Training com a categoria dela, em uma situação na qual sua aparência marcial ou posição social importe, você pode adicionar 1d4 a um Charisma (Intimidation) ou Charisma (Persuasion) check. Depois de adicionar esse dado, você não pode fazê-lo novamente até terminar um Short or Long Rest.
A propriedade não funciona contra criaturas que não reconheçam símbolos sociais, militares ou culturais.
